docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALLE, NATALI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC $12,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,075.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED TO FACTS ESTABLISHING BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT SHE HAD BEEN SEXUALLY HARASSED, THAT SHE HAD COMPLAINED ABOUT IT AND THAT SHE HAD BEEN TERMINATED FOR PRETEXTUAL REASONS ON OR ABOUT 1-22-25. ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES EXHAUSTED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALLE, NATALI AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-05-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF NATALI VALLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF NATALI VALLE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,000.00 FILED BY VALLE, NATALI AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-17-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION ORGANIC
